Synopsis

She was smitten by you immediately, and she doted on you whenever she had a spare moment between classes. And although she seemed sad sometimes, Nako was always a better parent to you than Ichigo, who never seemed pleased with anything you did. Since then, you've been a happy family. Nako started getting therapy, and her sadness dissipated over time. She switched from corporate law to becoming a Victim Support Officer at the local Public Prosecutors Office.

But you still feel like something's missing from your life. You struggle to be the masculine boy society expects you to be, and always feel somewhat out of place.
